title: Underdeck Maps — mutable pointer (latest-v1.json)
description: The tiny, mutable pointer at the top of the content chain. It names the tag-pinned manifest for the current content release. Bounds mirror the app's MapContentValidator (MapLimits). File size cap: 64 KB (enforced by content-ci.yml, not expressible in JSON Schema).

schemaVersion.description: Pointer schema version. 1 for the current app.

contentVersion.description: Human content version string (e.g. "2026.07.0"). Drives the gallery "What's new" banner.

tag.description: The immutable git tag the manifest + documents + assets are pinned to (e.g. "content-2026.07.0").

minAppVersion.description: Lowest app version that may load this content. Older apps ignore the pointer.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the referenced bytes. Emitted by content-ci.yml.

path.description: Repo-relative path under the tag, joined onto the manifest cdnBase.

bytes.description: Declared byte length of the referenced file. Used by the app's pre-download size gate.
